testcase.name: Auth Suite › A1: Login with valid student credentials
Auth Suite › A2: Login with valid parent credentials
Auth Suite › A3: Login with valid advisor credentials
Auth Suite › A4: Login with valid observer credentials
Auth Suite › A5: Login with valid superadmin credentials
Auth Suite › A6: Login with valid org admin credentials
Auth Suite › A7: Login with invalid email shows error
Auth Suite › A8: Login with wrong password shows error
Auth Suite › A9: Login with empty fields shows validation
Auth Suite › A10: Logout returns to login page
Auth Suite › A11: Session persists on page refresh
Auth Suite › A12: Protected route redirects unauthenticated user to login
